##LOCALITY=Synthetic
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Deng-Shiu Yang
##DESCRIPTION=Dark red crystals, some are triply twinned, platy ones are doubly twinned, and elongated prismatic crystals are untwinned.
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R120076
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated

##FILETYPE=Raman RAW
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
